title: Register of SMSF messaging providers
description: See the self-managed super fund (SMSF) messaging providers who can provide an electronic service address.
keywords: electronic service address, ESA, SMSF messaging provider

content_blocks.text: About the SMSF messaging providers register
This register lists self-managed super fund (SMSF) messaging service providers who can provide an electronic service address (ESA) for contributions, rollovers and release authorities.
When you receive an ESA, you must provide this address to us using one of the following methods:
You can also update the ESA by lodging the paper form Change of details for superannuation entities (NAT 3036, PDF 1,040KB) This link will download a file .
Time limits may apply to your ESA subscription so make sure it's active and continues to provide the functionality you require.

Your SMSF can only have one ESA address recorded with us. This means if you require both contributions and rollovers or release authorities, then you need to select a provider that offers both services.
We don't recommend or endorse any of the listed SMSF messaging service providers. We provide this register for your information, subject to terms and conditions .

rows: Westpac QuickSuper SMSF Gateway External Link BusinessPremiumWestpacWBC@westpac.com.au
Colladium SMSF Gateway External Link support@colladium.com
Macquarie Bank Limited External Link transact@macquarie.com
SuperMate (provided by SuperConcepts) External Link support@supermate.com.au
The Super Group External Link info@supergroup.com.au

content_blocks.text: We continue to update the register, as providers are certified.

If you are experiencing issues getting an ESA to make a rollover from your SMSF or receive a rollover from another SMSF, phone us on 13 10 20 and select fast key codes 4 then 1 to discuss your options.
We will check if you have rollover services with your SMSF messaging provider.
If you do, we will ask you to contact them for further assistance.
We will maintain the register subject to the following terms and conditions:

items: It is a public register of SMSF messaging service providers who provide publicly available information for inclusion in the register on a voluntary basis.

Service providers whose details are included in the register warrant that they are providing a messaging service for the express purpose of enabling regulated super entities to comply with their obligations under the Superannuation Industry (Supervision) Regulations 1994 .
The Commissioner of Taxation reserves the right to remove or modify a service provider’s details at any time.
While we make reasonable efforts to ensure the register is made available, we make no guarantees to provide continuously available access to it or access which is uninterrupted or fault-free.
While we take all reasonable care to ensure information in the register is accurate, changes in circumstances may occur at any time and affect accuracy.

We do not provide any warranty, make any representation as to, or accept responsibility for, the accuracy, correctness, reliability, timeliness or completeness, now or in the future, of any information provided via the register.

content_text:
## About the SMSF messaging providers register
This register lists self-managed super fund (SMSF) messaging service providers who can provide an electronic service address (ESA) for contributions, rollovers and release authorities.
When you receive an ESA, you must provide this address to us using one of the following methods:
- through Online services for business
- by contacting your tax agent
- by contacting us.
You can also update the ESA by lodging the paper form Change of details for superannuation entities (NAT 3036, PDF 1,040KB) This link will download a file .
Time limits may apply to your ESA subscription so make sure it's active and continues to provide the functionality you require.
Your SMSF can only have one ESA address recorded with us. This means if you require both contributions and rollovers or release authorities, then you need to select a provider that offers both services.
We don't recommend or endorse any of the listed SMSF messaging service providers. We provide this register for your information, subject to terms and conditions .
Provider | Contributions | Rollovers and release authorities
Westpac QuickSuper SMSF Gateway External Link BusinessPremiumWestpacWBC@westpac.com.au | Yes | No
BGL External Link info@bglcorp.com.au | Yes | Yes
Class Super External Link support@class.com.au | Yes | Yes
Colladium SMSF Gateway External Link support@colladium.com | Yes | No
Macquarie Bank Limited External Link transact@macquarie.com | Yes | No
SuperMate (provided by SuperConcepts) External Link support@supermate.com.au | Yes | Yes
Wrkr External Link support@wrkr.com.au | Yes | Yes
Provider | Contributions | Rollovers and release authorities
esuperfund External Link SuperStream@esuperfund.com.au | Yes | Yes
netwealth External Link contact@netwealth.com.au | Yes | No
The Super Group External Link info@supergroup.com.au | Yes | Yes
Australia Post External Link superannuation@auspost.com.au | Yes | Yes
We continue to update the register, as providers are certified.
## Experiencing issues obtaining an ESA?
If you are experiencing issues getting an ESA to make a rollover from your SMSF or receive a rollover from another SMSF, phone us on 13 10 20 and select fast key codes 4 then 1 to discuss your options.
We will check if you have rollover services with your SMSF messaging provider.
If you do, we will ask you to contact them for further assistance.
## Terms and conditions
We will maintain the register subject to the following terms and conditions:
- It is a public register of SMSF messaging service providers who provide publicly available information for inclusion in the register on a voluntary basis.
- Service providers whose details are included in the register warrant that they are providing a messaging service for the express purpose of enabling regulated super entities to comply with their obligations under the Superannuation Industry (Supervision) Regulations 1994 .
- The Commissioner of Taxation reserves the right to remove or modify a service provider’s details at any time.
- While we make reasonable efforts to ensure the register is made available, we make no guarantees to provide continuously available access to it or access which is uninterrupted or fault-free.
- While we take all reasonable care to ensure information in the register is accurate, changes in circumstances may occur at any time and affect accuracy.
- We do not provide any warranty, make any representation as to, or accept responsibility for, the accuracy, correctness, reliability, timeliness or completeness, now or in the future, of any information provided via the register.
